title: Advanced Proxy Manager
no_proxy_hint: Comma-separated: local subnets and hosts that bypass the proxy.
check_urls_hint: Endpoints returning HTTP 204. At least one must succeed.
pkg_warning: ⚠️ Some packages are not installed. Settings for them are disabled.
monitor_hint: If check fails, proxy is auto-disabled and a notification is sent.
hint_refresh: 💡 After applying, refresh package lists in Software Updates / cockpit-apt.
